text: Patient is 85 years old and presents for annual full checkup, feeling generally well
transcript_quote: it has been about a year since your last full checkup. How have you been feeling overall?

text: Denies chest pain, pressure, or tightness on walks; occasional exertional twinge in the yard that resolves with rest

slots.exception: brief exertional twinge relieved by sitting

transcript_quote: No, nothing like that. Once in a while I get a twinge if I overdo it in the yard, but it passes as soon as I sit down.

text: Has not needed nitroglycerin spray in a long time
transcript_quote: I have not had to use that little spray in a long while.

text: Denies shortness of breath, ankle swelling, and paroxysmal nocturnal dyspnea
transcript_quote: No, none of that. No swelling. I sleep like a rock, always have.

text: Denies dizziness, lightheadedness, and falls in the past year
transcript_quote: No falls. I hold the rail on the stairs like my daughter makes me promise to.

text: Appetite is good and weight is steady
transcript_quote: Appetite is fine. I eat what the garden gives me, mostly.

text: Patient retired in June after 60-year career; now out of the labor force
transcript_quote: Sixty years of keeping books for people, and I closed the ledger for good in June.

text: Lives with daughter and grandson; three people in the household
transcript_quote: my daughter and grandson live with me

text: No difficulty affording food, medications, or transportation to appointments; financially comfortable
transcript_quote: No, we are comfortable. I saved carefully.

text: PRAPARE social needs assessment completed; primary insurance Medicare, has stable housing, sees close contacts less than once a week, stress level 'a little bit'
Medication reconciliation performed using patient's brought-in bottles
transcript_quote: Let us go through your medications one by one — it has been a while since we did a proper reconciliation

text: Simvastatin 20 mg discontinued (duplicate statin; empty bottle from prior hospitalization)
transcript_quote: Simvastatin comes off the list today.

text: Old metoprolol 50 mg discontinued as duplicate/outdated dose
transcript_quote: the old fifty-milligram metoprolol are off the list

text: Continue atorvastatin 20 mg orally every evening, no missed days
transcript_quote: Let us keep the atorvastatin every evening, no missed days

text: Continue metoprolol extended-release 100 mg orally each morning
transcript_quote: I take the hundred in the morning.

text: Continue aspirin 81 mg orally daily
transcript_quote: the baby aspirin, the eighty-one, and the losartan fifty — still every day?

text: Continue losartan 50 mg orally daily
transcript_quote: the baby aspirin, the eighty-one, and the losartan fifty — still every day?

text: Continue carrying nitroglycerin spray as needed
transcript_quote: keep carrying it, but I am glad you have not needed it

text: Started metformin extended-release 500 mg orally once daily with dinner for type 2 diabetes/metabolic syndrome
transcript_quote: add a gentle dose of metformin, the extended-release kind, five hundred milligrams once daily with dinner

text: Started hydrochlorothiazide 25 mg orally each morning to smooth blood pressure and lower potassium
transcript_quote: I want to add hydrochlorothiazide, twenty-five milligrams each morning — a mild water pill.

text: Counseled that metformin ER with food reduces GI upset; call rather than quit if it causes stomach upset
transcript_quote: If it bothers you, call me — do not just quit it quietly.

text: Counseled to take hydrochlorothiazide in the morning and report dizziness or feeling washed out, especially on standing
transcript_quote: If you feel dizzy or washed out, especially when you stand up, I want to hear about it right away.

text: Blood pressure 107/58 mm Hg
transcript_quote: Blood pressure today is one-oh-seven over fifty-eight

text: Heart rate 96 /min
transcript_quote: your heart rate is ninety-six

text: Weight 78.5 kg; BMI 27.8 kg/m2
transcript_quote: Weight is seventy-eight and a half kilos, and the body mass index works out to twenty-seven point eight

text: Hemoglobin A1c 5.45% — excellent control for type 2 diabetes
transcript_quote: The A1c ... came back at five point four five percent, which is excellent for someone with type two diabetes

text: Fasting glucose low at ~66 mg/dL; advised not to skip breakfast before walks
transcript_quote: Your fasting sugar this morning was actually on the low side, around sixty-six, so I do not want you skipping breakfast before those walks.

text: Creatinine 0.6 mg/dL — kidney function strong
transcript_quote: Kidneys look strong — creatinine is zero point six.

text: Potassium mildly elevated at 5.16 mmol/L
transcript_quote: Your potassium ran a touch high at five point one six.

text: Total cholesterol 226 mg/dL with LDL 148 mg/dL — higher than desired given cardiac history
transcript_quote: total is about two twenty-six with the LDL at one forty-eight, which is higher than I want for a man with your heart history

text: Recheck lipids before any statin dose change
transcript_quote: recheck before we change any dose

text: Depression screening (PHQ-2) score 0
transcript_quote: the mood ones twice over ... Every score came back a zero

text: Domestic abuse/safety screening (HARK) score 0
transcript_quote: the safety-at-home questions

text: Substance/drug use screening (DAST-10) score 0
transcript_quote: the alcohol and drug ones. Every score came back a zero

text: Fall risk (Morse Fall Scale) score 22 — low risk
transcript_quote: your fall-risk score was twenty-two, which sits in the low-risk range

text: Ex-smoker per tobacco status; reports no alcohol or drug use beyond coffee
transcript_quote: I told her the strongest thing I take is black coffee.

text: Chronic anemia stable/quiet; no new blood count drawn today, will monitor at next labs
transcript_quote: Your anemia has been quiet too — no new blood count today ... we will keep watching it at the next round of labs.

text: Gingivitis diagnosed — red, puffy lower gums that bleed with brushing
transcript_quote: Your gums are red and puffy along the lower teeth, and you mentioned they bleed when you brush.

text: Counseled that gum disease and heart disease are linked; treatment recommended
transcript_quote: gum disease and heart disease are unfriendly neighbors

text: Referral placed to dental clinic for cleaning and exam
transcript_quote: I am sending a referral to the dental clinic for a proper cleaning and exam.

text: Influenza vaccine (trivalent, preservative-free) administered today; no prior bad reactions
transcript_quote: we will do it before you leave

text: Follow-up in about 6 months for repeat labs; return sooner for chest pain, dizziness, or GI intolerance to new medication
transcript_quote: I will see you back in about six months for repeat labs — sooner if there is any chest pain, dizziness, or if the new pill argues with your stomach.

text: Advised not to skip breakfast before morning walks
transcript_quote: no skipped breakfasts

text: Pain severity reported as 1/10
Basic metabolic panel and lipid panel completed and finalized
Assessment of health and social care needs completed
